coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in likely needs to clarify how your senior engineer is balancing core priorities against delivery friction and stakeholder communication.
openingQuestion: What are you deliberately saying no to right now so your time stays on the work that matters most this sprint?
listenFor: whether they name one concrete tradeoff instead of listing everything as urgent
whether they point to a specific dependency, decision, or team that is slowing progress
whether they volunteer a recent stakeholder update or if they stay vague about who is informed
avoid: do not turn the check-in into a status readout on every task
do not jump straight to fixing blockers before testing how they are prioritizing and communicating
goodOutcome: You and Test have agreed which senior-level work should stay top priority for the next two weeks and one dependency or stakeholder path you will help unblock.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one current project where Test's prioritization or stakeholder updates most affect delivery so you can anchor the conversation in a real example.
